name: Input
description: Styled text input with label, prefix/suffix, icons, error state.

api.name: Input
api.description: Styled text input with label, prefix/suffix, icons, error state.

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: The input's text value. Controlled together with ValueChanged; when left unbound the input tracks its own typing internally.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Fires on every edit (keystroke, clear, paste) with the new value.

parameters.name: OnInput
parameters.description: Raw oninput passthrough, fired alongside ValueChanged for consumers that need the underlying ChangeEventArgs.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: When true, the input is not editable/focusable and renders with reduced opacity.

parameters.name: Prefix
parameters.description: Content rendered before the text (e.g. an icon or unit). Forces the wrapped-input layout even while the field is empty.

parameters.name: Suffix
parameters.description: Content rendered after the text (e.g. an icon or unit). Forces the wrapped-input layout.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Controls the input's height, font size and horizontal padding. Defaults to Md.

parameters.name: Density
parameters.description: Overrides the ambient DensityScope for this input's vertical rhythm and accessory padding. Falls back to the cascaded density, then Comfortable.

parameters.name: Clearable
parameters.description: When true, shows an X button that clears the value while it's non-empty. Forces the wrapped-input layout even when the field is empty, so the clear button never triggers a remount on the first/last character.

parameters.name: OnClear
parameters.description: Fires after the user clicks the clear button, once the value has already been reset to empty and echoed via ValueChanged.

parameters.name: Required
parameters.description: Marks the field as required, setting aria-required and (outside a FormField) appending a destructive-colored asterisk to the label.

parameters.name: Invalid
parameters.description: Forces the invalid/error visual state (destructive border and focus ring) and aria-invalid, independent of the ambient FormField's validation state.

parameters.name: ErrorText
parameters.description: Error message shown below the input (outside a FormField) when Invalid is set. Takes precedence over HelperText.

parameters.name: HelperText
parameters.description: Helper text shown below the input (outside a FormField) when there is no error to display.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Label text rendered above the input (outside a FormField, which supplies its own label).

parameters.name: Name
parameters.description: HTML name attribute, used for native form submission and posted alongside the value.

parameters.name: ShowCount
parameters.description: Renders a character counter below the input, matching Textarea's pattern.

parameters.name: MaxLength
parameters.description: HTML maxlength on the input plus the limit shown in the counter. When null and ShowCount is true, only the current length is rendered.

parameters.name: CountFormat
parameters.description: Optional custom counter formatter (e.g. c => $"{c} of 60 chars"). Default renders 42 or 42/60 when MaxLength is set.

parameters.name: AutoFocus
parameters.description: Focuses the underlying <input> on first render. The HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM because the browser's autofocus algorithm runs during initial document parsing — at parse time the WASM runtime hasn't booted yet and no <input> exists for it to focus. This parameter uses ElementReference.FocusAsync in OnAfterRenderAsync(firstRender) which is the canonical workaround.

parameters.name: Variant
parameters.description: Visual / semantic input variant. Default is the plain text input. Search auto-renders a search icon prefix, sets type="search" (gives platforms a clear-button + IME hints), and applies a search-friendly minimum width so the field doesn't collapse in narrow flex containers — replaces the min-w-[180px] max-w-md + manual icon prefix consumers previously shipped at every search field call-site.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the input (or its wrapper when Prefix/Suffix/Clearable/Search is active).

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the underlying <input> element (not the wrapper), so placeholder/id/autocomplete/aria-* reach the focusable element.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Fires on every edit (keystroke, clear, paste) with the new value.

events.name: OnInput
events.description: Raw oninput passthrough, fired alongside ValueChanged for consumers that need the underlying ChangeEventArgs.

events.name: OnClear
events.description: Fires after the user clicks the clear button, once the value has already been reset to empty and echoed via ValueChanged.

examples.title: With Binding
examples.code:
<Input Value="@_name" OnInput="@(e => _name = e.Value?.ToString() ?? "")" placeholder="Enter your name" />
<Lumeo.Text Size="sm" Color="muted">Value: @_name</Lumeo.Text>

@code {
    private string _name = "";
}

slots.name: Prefix
slots.description: Content rendered before the text (e.g. an icon or unit). Forces the wrapped-input layout even while the field is empty.

slots.name: Suffix
slots.description: Content rendered after the text (e.g. an icon or unit). Forces the wrapped-input layout.

mdSummary:
# Input

Styled text input with label, prefix/suffix, icons, error state.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Inputs
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/input

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Input | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| Input | Value | `string?` | `` | The input's text value. Controlled together with ValueChanged; when left unbound the input tracks its own typing internally. |
| Input | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` | Fires on every edit (keystroke, clear, paste) with the new value. |
| Input | OnInput | `EventCallback<ChangeEventArgs>` | `` | Raw oninput passthrough, fired alongside ValueChanged for consumers that need the underlying ChangeEventArgs. |
| Input | Disabled | `bool` | `false` | When true, the input is not editable/focusable and renders with reduced opacity. |
| Input | Prefix | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Content rendered before the text (e.g. an icon or unit). Forces the wrapped-input layout even while the field is empty. |
| Input | Suffix | `RenderFragment?` | `` | Content rendered after the text (e.g. an icon or unit). Forces the wrapped-input layout. |
| Input | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` | Controls the input's height, font size and horizontal padding. Defaults to Md. |
| Input | Density | `Density?` | `` | Overrides the ambient DensityScope for this input's vertical rhythm and accessory padding. Falls back to the cascaded density, then Comfortable. |
| Input | InheritedDensity | `Density?` | `` |  |
| Input | Clearable | `bool` | `false` | When true, shows an X button that clears the value while it's non-empty. Forces the wrapped-input layout even when the field is empty, so the clear button never triggers a remount on the first/last character. |
| Input | OnClear | `EventCallback` | `` | Fires after the user clicks the clear button, once the value has already been reset to empty and echoed via ValueChanged. |
| Input | Required | `bool` | `false` | Marks the field as required, setting aria-required and (outside a FormField) appending a destructive-colored asterisk to the label. |
| Input | Invalid | `bool` | `false` | Forces the invalid/error visual state (destructive border and focus ring) and aria-invalid, independent of the ambient FormField's validation state. |
| Input | ErrorText | `string?` | `` | Error message shown below the input (outside a FormField) when Invalid is set. Takes precedence over HelperText. |
| Input | HelperText | `string?` | `` | Helper text shown below the input (outside a FormField) when there is no error to display. |
| Input | Label | `string?` | `` | Label text rendered above the input (outside a FormField, which supplies its own label). |
| Input | Name | `string?` | `` | HTML name attribute, used for native form submission and posted alongside the value. |
| Input | ShowCount | `bool` | `false` | Renders a character counter below the input, matching Textarea's pattern. |
| Input | MaxLength | `int?` | `` | HTML maxlength on the input plus the limit shown in the counter. When null and ShowCount is true, only the current length is rendered. |
| Input | CountFormat | `Func<int, string>?` | `` | Optional custom counter formatter (e.g. c =\> $"{c} of 60 chars"). Default renders 42 or 42/60 when MaxLength is set. |
| Input | AutoFocus | `bool` | `false` | Focuses the underlying \<input\> on first render. The HTML autofocus attribute doesn't work in Blazor WASM because the browser's autofocus algorithm runs during initial document parsing — at parse time the WASM runtime hasn't booted yet and no \<input\> exists for it to focus. This parameter uses ElementReference.FocusAsync in OnAfterRenderAsync(firstRender) which is the canonical workaround. |
| Input | Variant | `InputVariant` | `InputVariant.Default` | Visual / semantic input variant. Default is the plain text input. Search auto-renders a search icon prefix, sets type="search" (gives platforms a clear-button + IME hints), and applies a search-friendly minimum width so the field doesn't collapse in narrow flex containers — replaces the min-w-[180px] max-w-md + manual icon prefix consumers previously shipped at every search field call-site. |
| Input | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the input (or its wrapper when Prefix/Suffix/Clearable/Search is active). |
| Input | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Captures any unmatched attributes and applies them to the underlying \<input\> element (not the wrapper), so placeholder/id/autocomplete/aria-* reach the focusable element. |

## Slots
- `Prefix` (Input) — Content rendered before the text (e.g. an icon or unit). Forces the wrapped-input layout even while the field is empty.
- `Suffix` (Input) — Content rendered after the text (e.g. an icon or unit). Forces the wrapped-input layout.

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`) — Fires on every edit (keystroke, clear, paste) with the new value.
- `OnInput` (`EventCallback<ChangeEventArgs>`) — Raw oninput passthrough, fired alongside ValueChanged for consumers that need the underlying ChangeEventArgs.
- `OnClear` (`EventCallback`) — Fires after the user clicks the clear button, once the value has already been reset to empty and echoed via ValueChanged.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)
- `InheritedDensity` (`Density?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Input />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-destructive`, `--color-foreground`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/Input/Input.razor`
